General.Name: San Miguel Brewery Hong Kong Ltd
General.Description: San Miguel Brewery Hong Kong Limited manufactures and distributes bottled, canned, and draught beers in Hong Kong, Mainland China, and internationally. The company offers its beers under the San Miguel Pale Pilsen, San Mig Light, San Miguel Pale Pilsen, San Miguel Cerveza Negra, San Miguel Cerveza Blanca, Red Horse, Blue Ice, Kirin Ichiban, Kirin Lager, Magners Original Apple, Blackthorn, Mahou Cinco Estrellas Session IPA, Spitfire Amber Ale, Whitstable Bay Blonde Lager, BrÜck, Knight, Dragon Gold, Dragon Qing Chun, Dragon Legend, and Dragon Yue X brands. It also engages in the distribution of imported beer products, as well as leases investment properties. The company was founded in 1948 and is based in Sha Tin, Hong Kong. San Miguel Brewery Hong Kong Limited is a subsidiary of Neptunia Corporation Limited.
General.Address: Citimark Building, Sha Tin, Hong Kong
